title: androcera rostrata
intro: Androcera rostrata, also known as Indian long pepper or Piper rostratum, is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Piperaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Androcera rostrata include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain relief and reduction of inflammation. Herbal preparations of Androcera rostrata include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
